notes: Pure arithmetic leaf file with no project imports; provides two forms of Silverman V.1.1 (the discriminant lemma lifting Q≥0 from a p-coprime sublattice to all integers). Both long proofs follow the same two-step pattern (force t²≤4q, then PSD). The second theorem (qf_nonneg_of_nonneg_on_coprime_both) is a Route-B strengthening with a weaker hypothesis that avoids the balanced-remainder helper; exists_int_balanced is used only inside the file by qf_nonneg_of_nonneg_on_coprime and is not referenced externally.
